description: Successful session with good process discipline. Model must identify 2-3 specific critical moments, provide Start/Stop/Keep insights, and answer the ONE thing question.
input: Session complete. We added webhook support. TDD was followed throughout — 5 steps, each with a called shot and failing test first. One intervention was needed when the agent tried to write a God class instead of the planned split. Took 90 minutes.

description: Session where TDD discipline broke down mid-session. Model must identify the breakdown as a critical moment and give actionable Start/Stop/Keep guidance for preventing recurrence.
input: Session complete but TDD broke down in step 3. The agent wrote the full implementation before any test, claiming the logic was too simple to test-drive. We caught it and reset but lost 20 minutes. Feature works but test coverage feels retrofitted.

description: Short focused session (single bug fix). Model must still provide the complete retrospective structure — not skip sections because the session was small.
input: Short session: fixed a nil pointer crash in the payment processor when currency is missing. One test added, one line fixed. 15 minutes total. No process issues.
